wrong_metadata.details: Citation key prefix 'zhuo' does not match any author. First author is Liming Yang. Last author (corresponding) is Zhenpeng Chen. Key should be yang2025bamas or chen2025bamas.
Citation key says 2024 but the paper was posted to arXiv on 2025-12-31 (arXiv:2512.24776). Year in key is incorrect.
Key says 2023 (arXiv date) but paper was published at ICML 2024. Consider updating key to du2024debate if using publication year convention.
Key says 2024 (arXiv date) but paper was published at ICLR 2025. Consider updating key to ong2025routellm if using publication year convention.
Key says 2023 (arXiv date) but paper was published at ICLR 2024. Consider updating key to mialon2024gaia if using publication year convention.
First author on arXiv is actually Aman Madaan (co-first with Pranjal Aggarwal). Key says aggarwal but madaan is listed first in final NeurIPS version. Minor.

Paper title in literature_map.json says 'Difficulty-Aware Agent Orchestration in LLM-Powered Workflows' but actual title on arXiv (v2) is 'Difficulty-Aware Agentic Orchestration for Query-Specific Multi-Agent Workflows'. The v1 title matches the literature_map.

critical_issues.details: The same paper (Agrawal & Goyal, 2013, 'Thompson Sampling for Contextual Bandits with Linear Payoffs') is cited with TWO different keys: 'agrawal2013thompson' in related_work.md (line 34) and 'agrawal2013contextual_ts' in method.md (line 26) and discussion.md (line 46). These must be unified to a single key.
critical_issues.fix: Replace all instances with one key. Recommend: agrawal2013thompson (matches existing bib entry).

critical_issues.details: There is no bibliography.bib file for Paper 4 (ParetOrch). The only bib file is paper/output/adaptswitch/references.bib which belongs to Paper 3 (AdaptSwitch). Of the 25 citation keys used in Paper 4 sections, only 5 have matching entries in the AdaptSwitch bib (hong2024metagpt, qian2024chatdev, wu2023autogen, wang2023voyager, agrawal2013thompson). The other 20 keys have NO bib entry anywhere.
critical_issues.fix: Create paper/output/bibliography.bib (or paper/output/paretorch/references.bib) with entries for all 25 citation keys.

user_requested_keys_not_in_paper.note: The following keys were listed in the user request but do NOT appear in any \cite{} command in the paper sections. They may be in the literature_map.json but are not actually cited.
user_requested_keys_not_in_paper.explanation: These keys appear in the literature_map.json but the paper sections use different citation keys. For example: the paper uses hong2024metagpt not hong2023metagpt; uses agrawal2013thompson not marinov2021pareto_frontier. The user-listed keys that are not cited in the paper at all (wang2024cascade_aware, dekoninck2024unified, marinov2021pareto_frontier, zhu2022pareto_bandits, llm_cascade_moo2024, pareto_llm_errors2024) are present in the literature_map but were NOT included in any section.
